title: Should You Ride with Real Food or Energy Gels? 5 Factors to Help You Decide.
content:
Sport nutrition might blow your budget, but 'real' food might blow out your guts. Here's how to make the right decision for every type of ride.

Read the full article at Should You Ride with Real Food or Energy Gels? 5 Factors to Help You Decide. on Velo.
author: Jim Cotton
